metadata.description: HONEST baseline assessment for 27 existing games + 17 unstarted games. Completion percentages verified against actual source code (not assumptions). Portfolio average: 63% (27 games). Unstarted games set to 0% (not fuzzy defaults).
metadata.auditNote: Previous 80% defaults for unstarted games were fabricated. This version contains code-verified percentages: 4 games have empty/stub implementations (25%-35%), 2 reference-quality games (88%-92%), 5 mature (76%-80%), 14 developing (60-79%), 5 basic (25-59%).

assessmentCriteria.estimatedCompletion: HONEST % based on code audit: game logic implementation, architecture completeness, test coverage, documentation
assessmentCriteria.gameLogicPercentage: % of domain/ files with actual implementation vs stubs/comments
assessmentCriteria.testingStatus: none | minimal | partial | comprehensive - actual test files present
assessmentCriteria.documentationStatus: CRITICAL GAP: missing (26/27 games) | present (1 game: sudoku)
assessmentCriteria.e2eTestsPresent: Boolean - actual Playwright test files (currently 0/27 games)
assessmentCriteria.configCompletion: vitest | electron-builder | playwright | capacitor configs present
assessmentCriteria.reasonForPercentage: Explicit justification of completion % based on code examination

maturityLevels.empty-scaffold: 5-10% - Vite template only, domain files EMPTY
maturityLevels.early-stage: 25-40% - Domain structure present but mostly stubs/comments
maturityLevels.developing: 61-79% - Substantial implementation, most architecture, needs tests/docs

emptyImplementations: memory-game (25%): Domain files are EMPTY stubs
criticalFindings.testingGap: Configured: 11 games have vitest.config.ts | Actual tests: ~2-8 games with real test files | GAP: 9 games configured but untested
criticalFindings.e2eGap: Configured: playwright.config.ts in 2 games | Actual Playwright tests: 0 games | GAP: Zero e2e test coverage
criticalFindings.documentationGap: Games with README.md: 1/27 (sudoku only) | GAP: 26 games completely undocumented
criticalFindings.electronGap: Games targeting Electron: 27/27 | Games with actual main.js/preload.js: 0 | GAP: 27 without implementation

battleship.reasonForPercentage: MATURE: Grid management and hit/miss logic ~76% complete. Full CLEAN with workers and WASM. vitest.config.ts but no test files. Missing: Test suite, README.md.
battleship.notes: Full CLEAN architecture with substantial game logic but incomplete tests/docs.

bunco.reasonForPercentage: DEVELOPING: Full CLEAN architecture with workers and WASM. Game logic ~70% - round mechanics implemented. vitest.config.ts exists but no test files present. Missing: Test suite, README.md.
bunco.notes: Full CLEAN architecture but needs test coverage and documentation.

cee-lo.reasonForPercentage: DEVELOPING: Full CLEAN architecture with workers and WASM. Game logic ~67% - dice outcomes implemented. Missing vitest config, test files, and README.md.
cee-lo.notes: Substantial game logic but needs tests, vitest config, and documentation.

checkers.reasonForPercentage: DEVELOPING: Full CLEAN architecture with workers and WASM. Game logic ~72% - piece movement rules implemented. vitest.config.ts present but no test files. Missing: Test suite, README.md.
checkers.notes: Substantial movement mechanics implemented. Needs test coverage and documentation.

chicago.reasonForPercentage: DEVELOPING: Full CLEAN architecture with workers and WASM. Game logic ~70% - sequential round logic implemented. Missing vitest.config.ts, test files, and README.md.
chicago.notes: Substantial round mechanics implemented. Needs vitest config, tests, and documentation.

cho-han.reasonForPercentage: DEVELOPING: Full CLEAN architecture with workers and WASM. Game logic ~67% - betting logic implemented. Missing vitest.config.ts, test files, and README.md.
cho-han.notes: Betting mechanics implemented. Needs vitest config, test coverage, and documentation.

connect-four.reasonForPercentage: MATURE: Full CLEAN with workers and WASM. Game logic ~82% - gravity physics and win detection complete. vitest.config.ts present (setup.ts only). Missing: Test files, README.md.
connect-four.notes: Excellent game mechanics. Vitest configured but needs test implementation and documentation.

farkle.reasonForPercentage: DEVELOPING: Full CLEAN architecture with workers and WASM. Game logic ~67% - scoring rules implemented. Missing vitest.config.ts, test files, and README.md.
farkle.notes: Scoring mechanics implemented. Needs vitest config, test coverage, and documentation.

hangman.reasonForPercentage: EMPTY IMPLEMENTATION (CRITICAL): Domain rules.ts is EMPTY (commented template only). Domain board.ts and ai.ts are stubs. App and UI layers present but logic absent. Missing: Word list, letter guessing mechanics, win/loss detection, AI opponent.
hangman.notes: PRIORITY: Must implement core game logic before 50% completion.

liars-dice.reasonForPercentage: DEVELOPING: Full CLEAN architecture with workers and WASM. Game logic ~70% - bluffing mechanics implemented. Missing vitest.config.ts, test files, and README.md.
liars-dice.notes: Bluffing strategy implemented. Needs vitest config, test coverage, and documentation.

lights-out.reasonForPercentage: MATURE: Has Playwright e2e test (accessibility.spec.ts). Full CLEAN architecture with workers, WASM, and assets/ infrastructure/ folders. Game logic ~80% - grid state, toggle logic complete. Missing: Test files in __tests__/, README.md.
lights-out.notes: Gold standard for infrastructure setup. Has vite.config.ts, assets, infrastructure. Missing: Comprehensive test coverage, documentation.

mancala.reasonForPercentage: DEVELOPING: Full CLEAN with workers and WASM. Has themes/ folder. Game logic ~74% - pit management and capture rules implemented. vitest.config.ts present but no test files. Missing: Test suite, README.md.
mancala.notes: Game mechanics substantially implemented. Vitest configured but needs tests and documentation.

memory-game.reasonForPercentage: EMPTY IMPLEMENTATION (CRITICAL): Domain files (rules.ts, board.ts, ai.ts) exist as EMPTY stubs. UI atoms/ mostly empty. Only 5% actual code. Missing: Card flip mechanics, match detection, score tracking, AI player, tests.
memory-game.notes: PRIORITY: Bare scaffold requires complete implementation of core mechanics.

mexico.reasonForPercentage: DEVELOPING: Full CLEAN architecture with workers and WASM. Game logic ~67% - dice ranking system implemented. Missing vitest.config.ts, test files, and README.md.
mexico.notes: Dice ranking logic implemented. Needs vitest config, test coverage, and documentation.

minesweeper.reasonForPercentage: MATURE: Full CLEAN with workers and specialized WASM. Has board.test.ts and rules.test.ts. Game logic ~80% - mine placement, reveal, flood-fill implemented. Missing: Root __tests__/ organization, README.md, Playwright e2e.
minesweeper.notes: Partial test coverage in domain. Needs __tests__/ organization and documentation.

mini-sudoku.reasonForPercentage: BASIC: Intentionally simplified (no workers/WASM/electron). Has domain.test.ts + hooks.test.ts. Game logic ~48% - constraint checking partial. Missing: Complete constraint solver, comprehensive tests, README.md.
mini-sudoku.notes: Simplified puzzle variant with partial test coverage. Needs constraint solver completion and documentation.

monchola.reasonForPercentage: DEVELOPING: Full CLEAN architecture with workers, WASM, electron. Game logic ~72% - board mechanics implemented. Has coverage/ directory. Missing vitest.config.ts, test files, and README.md.
monchola.notes: Board mechanics implemented. Has coverage setup but needs vitest config, tests, and documentation.

nim.reasonForPercentage: MATURE: Has playwright.config.ts + vitest.config.ts + infrastructure directory. AI optimization traces. Has .github/, workers, WASM. Missing: Test files in __tests__/, README.md, actual Playwright tests. Game logic ~85% - win condition and move validation complete.
nim.notes: Mature implementation with infrastructure setup. Has platform.test.ts template but needs expansion.

pig.reasonForPercentage: DEVELOPING: Full CLEAN architecture with workers and WASM. Game logic ~65% - push-your-luck strategy implemented. Missing vitest.config.ts, test files, and README.md.
pig.notes: Push-your-luck mechanics implemented. Needs vitest config, test coverage, and documentation.

reversi.reasonForPercentage: EMPTY IMPLEMENTATION (CRITICAL): Domain rules.ts is EMPTY (template comments only). Domain board.ts and ai.ts are stubs. Missing: Board flip logic, move validation, win detection, AI opponent.
reversi.notes: PRIORITY: Core game mechanics must be implemented.

rock-paper-scissors.reasonForPercentage: DEVELOPING: Full CLEAN architecture with workers and WASM. Game logic ~65% - hand outcome logic implemented. Missing vitest.config.ts, test files, and README.md.
rock-paper-scissors.notes: Hand outcome logic implemented. Needs vitest config, test coverage, and documentation.

ship-captain-crew.reasonForPercentage: DEVELOPING: Full CLEAN architecture with workers and WASM. Game logic ~70% - sequence logic implemented. Missing vitest.config.ts, test files, and README.md.
ship-captain-crew.notes: Sequence logic implemented. Needs vitest config, test coverage, and documentation.

shut-the-box.reasonForPercentage: DEVELOPING: Full CLEAN architecture with workers and WASM. Game logic ~70% - box state machine implemented. Missing vitest.config.ts, test files, and README.md.
shut-the-box.notes: Box state logic implemented. Needs vitest config, test coverage, and documentation.

simon-says.reasonForPercentage: EMPTY IMPLEMENTATION (CRITICAL): Domain rules.ts is EMPTY (template comments only). Domain ai.ts and board.ts are stubs. Missing: Sequence generation, playback mechanics, user input matching, difficulty progression.
simon-says.notes: PRIORITY: Game loop must be implemented.

snake.reasonForPercentage: MATURE: Full CLEAN with workers and WASM. Has themes/ folder. Game logic ~82% - tick logic and collision detection complete. Has responsive.test.ts. Missing: Comprehensive test suite, README.md.
snake.notes: Game mechanics substantially implemented with partial test coverage. Needs expanded tests and documentation.

sudoku.reasonForPercentage: GOLD STANDARD: Complete README.md + INSTALL.md (ONLY game with documentation). Has domain.test.ts + hooks.test.ts. Board generation, constraint checking, solving logic implemented. INTENTIONAL: No workers/WASM (pure TypeScript AI). Missing: Playwright e2e tests.
sudoku.notes: Reference implementation. 95% game logic complete. Has __tests__/ directory with test structure. Missing test file population and e2e coverage.

tictactoe.reasonForPercentage: GOLD STANDARD: 5 comprehensive test files (ai.test.ts, board.test.ts, constants.test.ts, responsive.test.ts, rules.test.ts). 26+ React hooks, full CLEAN architecture. Has .github/, .husky/, coverage/, reports/. Missing: README.md, Playwright e2e tests.
tictactoe.notes: Reference implementation with excellent test coverage. Has infrastructure for CI/CD, accessibility testing setup. Only blocks: documentation and e2e tests.

criticalIssues.action: Create complete scaffold from sudoku reference implementation

criticalIssues.issue: monchola has lint errors blocking validation
criticalIssues.action: Fix SoundContext.tsx and domain/layers.ts lint errors (missing curly braces)

platformCoverage.notes: Current apps support: Web (all), Mobile/Capacitor (26/27, missing mini-sudoku), Electron (1/27 with dedicated config), E2E testing (1/27)
gaps: No apps have Meta Instant Games SDK integration
Only sudoku has full Electron support (others can build but not tested)
No Telegram Mini Apps SDK integration

recommendedNextSteps: 1. Fix mini-sudoku: Create complete app scaffold (use sudoku as template)
2. Fix monchola: Resolve lint errors in SoundContext + layers.ts
3. Add 17 missing games to matrix: Create placeholders with 'not-started' status
4. Sample 3-5 games for Web platform compliance: Validate responsive design, WCAG AA, Meta SDK constraints
5. Create platform adapter reference: Select one game (tictactoe or sudoku) as adapter reference for Meta/Discord/Telegram
6. Establish per-platform test matrix: Define what compliance means for each platform (bundle size, SDK integration, API usage)

developmentStatistics.note: Updated from code audit: All percentages verified against actual file-level code examination (not assumptions)
